The '''Battle of Altyr V''' was a brutal skirmish fought between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]<ref name="gar" /> between [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] and [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].<ref name="TNEC" /> [[Clone Captain/Legends|Clone trooper captain]] [[Deviss/Legends|Deviss]] led the Republic forces alongside a [[Unidentified Jedi General (Altyr V)|Jedi General]] on<ref name="gar" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Altyr system/Legends|Altyr system]]</ref> [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Knight">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]]''</ref> [[Altyr V]]. However, the [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] was [[Death/Legends|vaporized]] by Separatist fire, leaving Deviss to improvise a plan of attack. Deviss rallied the remaining [[Company/Legends|companies]] of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] under his leadership and destroyed the Separatist [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]], opening the battlefield to [[Aerial bombardment/Legends|aerial bombardment]] and winning the battle for the Republic. For his act of bravery and initiative, [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Bly/Legends|Bly]] promoted Deviss to the rank of [[Commander/Legends|commander]].<ref name="gar" />

==Behind the scenes==
The battle was mentioned in the entry for Clone Commander Deviss in the article "[[Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic]]," which written by [[Karen Traviss]] and [[Ryan Kaufman (real person)|Ryan Kaufman]] and published in [[Star Wars Insider 84|''Star Wars Insider'' 84]],<ref name="gar" /> released on [[September 13]], [[2005]].<ref name="SW">{{SWArchive|url=community/fanclub/mag/news20050913.html|text=The Ultimate Clone Guide in ''Star Wars Insider'' #84}}</ref>
